recommendations.overview: A chance encounter with a stranger changes the life of a college gymnast.

recommendations.overview: When their bus is crippled on the side of a deserted road, a team of high school athletes discover an opponent they cannot defeat – and may not survive.

recommendations.title: Clownhouse
recommendations.overview: Three teenage brothers are terrorized by a trio of escaped mental patients disguised as clowns.

recommendations.overview: The infinite playground of forbidden worlds and dangerous lifeforms offered by the sci-fi horror genre will lead to the biggest, maddest, bloodiest V/H/S ever.

recommendations.overview: A truck driver plays a cat-and-mouse game with a mysterious serial killer in a van who lures young female hitchhiker victims on a desolate Australian highway.

recommendations.overview: An army ranger and his dog embark on a road trip along the Pacific Coast Highway to attend a friend's funeral.

recommendations.title: Taste of Fear
recommendations.overview: A wheelchair-bound young girl returns to her father's estate after ten years, and although she's told he's away, she keeps seeing his dead body on the estate.
